mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.category, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `likes` WHERE post_id = p.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `comment` WHERE post_id = p.id) AS comment_count, p.create_time, p.update_time, u.nickname AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM `post` p LEFT JOIN `user` u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.category, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `likes` WHERE post_id = p.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `comment` WHERE post_id = p.id) AS comment_count, p.create_time, p.update_time, u.nickname AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM `post` p LEFT JOIN `user` u ON p.user_id = u.id ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.category, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `likes` WHERE post_id = p.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `comment` WHERE post_id = p.id) AS comment_count, p.create_time, p.update_time, u.nickname AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM `post` p LEFT JOIN `user` u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `post` (user_id, title, content, category, like_count, comment_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
